landing.feature3Desc: Lale ri lotok ro am, lale ta jerbal ko rej bōk elaptata lale, im elaplok.

privacy.title: Kien in Kōjparok Mejenkajjik
privacy.intro: Privacy Policy in ej kwalok kin ewi wawein an DevFolio bōk, kajerbal, im kejbãrok melele ko am make ñe kwoj kajerbal jerbal ko am.
privacy.section1Content: Kimij bōk melele ko kwoj letok ñe kwoj kōmmane juon am account, kōmmane juon am portfolio, im kepaak jipan eo am.
privacy.section2Content: Melele ko am rej kōjerbali ñan jerbal, kejbãrok, im lelok men ko ilo jerbal ko am, im bareinwõt ñan konono ibbam ikijen account eo am ak jerbal ko am.
privacy.section3Content: Jej kōjerbal kein kejbarok ko rejimwe ñan kejbãrok melele ko am jen an armij ro jab maroñ deloñ, kwalok, ak kokkure.

verifyEmail.resendError: Ejjab maroñ in bar jilkintok email in kamool. Jouj im bar kajeoñ.
verifyEmail.title: Lale email eo am
verifyEmail.description: Kōm kar jilkintok juon email in kamool ñan email address eo am. Jouj im kōpellok email eo im jibwe <1>"Confirm Account"</1> button eo ñan kōmman bwe en jerbal account eo am.
verifyEmail.step1: Kōpellok email application eo am (Gmail, Yahoo, im ko jet)
verifyEmail.step2: Lale juon email jen DevFolio ippāñ unin kōnono eo "Account Activation"
verifyEmail.step4: Kwonaaj etal ñan peij in deloñ eo ñan am deloñ ilo
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Email in kamool eo emoj an bar jilkintok!
verifyEmail.resendButton: Bar Jilkintok Email in Kamool eo
verifyEmail.footerNote: Kwaar jab bōk email eo ke? Lale <1>Spam</1> ak <2>Junk</2> ilo email eo am. Link in kamool eo ej jerbal ñan <3>24 awa</3>.
